I don't usually say much in the description but I wish a merry Christmas to all the Tord bot creators and users because for some reason I feel like we've become a community due to the amount of bots that have been created ((seriously, it's not even a joke, we literally hit the goal of 600 bots at this point)) and it's really cool to have been able to share this with you guys this year, I hope you enjoy it!!

-Ball sucker, Tom
